summary: Completed comprehensive testing of plads filtering and 'Slet alt' button functionality. Both bug fixes are working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for POST requests
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact, just status code inconsistency

passed_tests: Plads filtering: 'Alle' button shows all tours correctly
Plads filtering: 'Glostrup' button filters to show only Glostrup tours
Plads filtering: 'Ballerup' button filters to show only Ballerup tours
Plads badges display correct tour counts for each location
Badge counts update correctly when filtering between plads
'Slet alt' button successfully clears all tours after confirmation
Badge counts reset to 0 after clearing all tours
Backend API endpoints working correctly (drivers, plads, reports, tours)
Mail parsing functionality works with proper tab-separated format
Tour creation and bulk operations functioning properly
